title: Eden baronets
summary:
There have been two baronetcies created for the surname Eden, one in the Baronetage of England and the other in the Baronetage of Great Britain. As of 2026 the two titles, united in 1844, are extant.

Eden baronets of West Auckland (1672)
Eden baronets of Maryland (1776)
text:
There have been two baronetcies created for the surname Eden, one in the Baronetage of England and the other in the Baronetage of Great Britain. As of 2026 the two titles, united in 1844, are extant.

Eden baronets of West Auckland (1672)
Eden baronets of Maryland (1776)
